name: Whitelist Accepted
description: Use when an application has been approved.

embed.title: Whitelist Status
embed.description: Your whitelist application has been approved. A staff member will guide you through any final next steps if they are still needed.

name: Whitelist Denied
description: Use when an application has been denied.

embed.title: Whitelist Status
embed.description: Your whitelist application has been denied. Review the staff feedback in this ticket before opening a new application.

name: Whitelist Under Review
description: Use when staff are actively reviewing the application.

embed.title: Whitelist Status
embed.description: Your whitelist application is under review. Please wait for a staff decision and keep new messages relevant to your application.

name: Need More Information
description: Use when the application is missing detail.

embed.title: More Information Needed
embed.description: Staff need more detail before the whitelist review can continue. Please answer the questions asked above in this ticket.

name: Duplicate Application
description: Use when the user already has an application open.

embed.title: Duplicate Application
embed.description: An application for you is already being handled. Please continue in the existing ticket instead of opening another one.
